ModMetaData.name: FIP - Whitespring
ModMetaData.author: Feil
ModMetaData.description: Rethemes Royalty's imperial hierarchy as the Enclave's pre-War command structure — covering royal titles, ranks, backstories, abilities, precepts, factions, transport ships, and persona weapons — with optional patches for deserter mechanics, empire integration, and FCP Enclave apparel.
